title: Bundle as Quiver
description: Use a bundle as storage to shoot arrows for bows and crossbows!
body:
# 💰 Bundle as Quiver ➹
- 🏹 **Draw Arrows (and Firework Rockets) from a Bundle** the same way you would without one: from a Bundle in the off-hand, hotbar & inventory.
- 🎯 **Prioritization within a Bundle** is based on their position; the last in is the first out. 
- ✨ **Works with Enchantments**, like Infinity & Quick Charge.
- 🛜 **Fully server-side**, no quirkyness on the client!
- 💀 **Works with custom Skeletons & Pillagers**; They'll never spawn with bundles, but were they to, it would work!
